common.tagline: Predict the scores and compete with your family on one board.

auth.title: Welcome
auth.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a six-digit login code.
auth.codeDescription: We sent a six-digit code to {email}.

errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired. Try again or resend it.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a bit, then try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.description: Tell the family who you are and pick your preferred language.

errors.generic: We couldn't save your profile. Please try again.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Update the name and language shown for your account.

errors.generic: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
